monday.question: What does the word 'experience' mean?
options: Something that happens to you in life
monday.correctAnswer: Something that happens to you in life

monday.question: Choose the correct present perfect question.

Have you ever been to Salvador?
Have you ever went to Salvador?
Are you ever been to Salvador?
monday.correctAnswer: Have you ever been to Salvador?

monday.question: What does 'ever' mean in the question 'Have you ever traveled alone?'
options: At any time in your life
monday.correctAnswer: At any time in your life

monday.correctAnswer: i have already visited brasília twice|i've already visited brasília twice|i have already visited brasilia twice|i've already visited brasilia twice

Translate to English: 'Ela nunca andou de avião.'

monday.correctAnswer: we have already tried japanese food|we've already tried japanese food

options: Did you have ever traveled alone?

tuesday.question: What does 'never' mean?

tuesday.question: She has _____ (be) to the USA three times.

wednesday.question: What does 'already' mean in 'I have already done my homework'?

options: I already have finished my homework.

wednesday.correctAnswer: I have already finished my homework.

She has _____ the office.

wednesday.correctAnswer: i have just spoken to the teacher|i've just spoken to the teacher|i have just talked to the teacher|i've just talked to the teacher

options: The action has not happened until now
The action happened a minute ago
wednesday.correctAnswer: The action has not happened until now

A: Did you ever been to Argentina? B: Yes, I did have.
A: Have you ever went to Argentina? B: Yes, I went have.
